modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to edit PDF files in Adobe Pro.

full_description_text: So, the user was trying to edit a PDF in Adobe Pro. They just couldn't figure out how to do it. It seems like they were on a call and really needed to make some changes. They mentioned something about wanting to add text or images but got stuck.
short_description: Unable to edit PDF files in Adobe Pro.
description: So, the user was trying to edit a PDF in Adobe Pro. They just couldn't figure out how to do it. It seems like they were on a call and really needed to make some changes. They mentioned something about wanting to add text or images but got stuck.
